# citation-sync

> A Claude Code skill (MIT) that keeps the three citation layers of a research repository in sync. It audits divergence between in-text citations in docs, `.zenodo.json` references, and `graph.jsonld` ExternalReference nodes, then syncs bottom-up — deferring each single-layer implementation to a specialist sibling skill. A former fourth layer (Wikidata P2860 edges) was permanently retired in 2026-07 after the host's governance revoked the author's self-created entries (authorship-strategy ADR-0021).

## Core documentation

- [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt): self-contained Q&A reference for AI agents (Project Facts, 9 question-form H2 sections)
- [README.md](README.md): human-facing narrative (three-layer table, install, phase overview)
- [SKILL.md](skills/citation-sync/SKILL.md): full skill specification — three-layer model, Phase 0-5 workflow, curation criteria, pitfalls table (skill body in Japanese; workflow and script are language-neutral)
- [citation_audit.py](skills/citation-sync/scripts/citation_audit.py): read-only audit script — per-repo identifier × layer matrix, exit 0 converged / 1 divergence / 2 fatal

## Architecture

- 4 citation layers: **1. docs** (in-text citations in ADRs / glossary / empirical notes — source of truth), **2. zenodo** (`.zenodo.json` `related_identifiers` → DataCite / OpenAIRE), **3. graph** (`graph.jsonld` ExternalReference nodes → LLM ingest), **4. wikidata** (repo item P2860 → Scholia, the cited researchers' side)
- 6-phase workflow: **Phase 0 Audit** (read-only script, `--skip-wikidata`, `--json`) → **Phase 1 Curate** (judgment layer — not every URL is a scholarly citation) → **Phases 2-4 layer-by-layer sync** (bottom-up) → **Phase 5 Verify** (re-run audit until converged)
- Orchestrator design: this skill owns only divergence detection, curation criteria, and sync order; single-layer writes are deferred to sibling skills
- Canonical copy lives in the author's Claude Code harness; this repo is a one-way mirror via `scripts/sync-from-local.sh`

## Standard reference

- [Agent Skill specification](https://agentskills.io/specification): the Claude Code skill format used by this repo
- [SkillsMP marketplace](https://agentskills.io/specification): one-step install via `/skills add`

## Sibling skills

- [release-doi](https://github.com/shimo4228/release-doi): canonical implementation for layer 2 — `.zenodo.json` citation surface within the release workflow
- [jsonld-knowledge-graph](https://github.com/shimo4228/jsonld-knowledge-graph): canonical implementation for layer 3 — ExternalReference node design in `graph.jsonld`
- wikidata-federation: former layer-4 implementation — retired and repository removed in 2026-07 (authorship-strategy ADR-0021)
